## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to …
2. Press …
3. …

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or logcat output if available.

## Device info

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Device | e.g. Miyoo Flip, Samsung Galaxy S21 |
| Android version | e.g. Android 13 |
| PocketTracker version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| Physical buttons? | Yes / No |

## Additional context

Screenshots, recordings, or project files that help reproduce the issue.
